response:
Progress Report, Part II  
This report highlights the visual enhancements implemented during the game's redevelopment. Although we have successfully nearly doubled the frame rate by incorporating optimization features into the framework, the integration of new hardware-intensive functionalities, such as dynamic fluid particles and physics-based hair strands, introduces performance challenges. We aim to maintain a balanced approach.  
Picture #1 illustrates the new belly bulge system. In the updated game, each character has a specific stomach capacity that determines how much "body fluid" they can absorb through their womb, stomach, and bowels. For instance, Dr. Anya can take in 4000ml of sperm without overflowing, whereas Alet is limited to 2800ml. Male test subjects release varying amounts of fluid during climax: a Dreamer typically expels about 10-15ml, while an Elder Thing delivers 400-600ml into their partner.  
Pictures #2 and #3 showcase the new cum and love juice visual effects. The fluid effects are not pre-designed for sex scenes and instead activate dynamically based on the character's sensitivity, ecstasy level, and stamina. Certain character abilities, obtained through testing with specific test subjects, may increase the likelihood of urinary incontinence or excessive squirting.  
Pictures #4 and #5 depict interactive body dynamics and skin decals in VR, with hands moving through a VR controller.  
Pictures #6, #7, and #8 preview upcoming bondage gear and cooperative sex scenarios. More details will be released in the coming months.  
The May Monthly Poll and returning costume bundle will be available in a few hours.
